title: Shinji is lukewarm
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is lukewarm!             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Feb 09, 2011 11:28 pm I mean, just look at him: *shrug*

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Wed Feb 09, 2011 11:30 pm Which is why he is spitten out of the mouths of everyone who comes into contact with him. He is "good for nothing." Actually makes a lot of sense. Lukewarm water isn't that useful. Cold water is good for drinking and hot water is good for bathing. Lukewarm on the other hand is very mehish.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Feb 09, 2011 11:45 pm Lukewarm water just feels sort of wrong. Like it wants to be cold or hot. It's indecisive, or lacks needed input from something around it to make it cold or hot. Shinji acts as the great equalizer of humanity in EoE, being the one to make the call for everyone to get into the pool. A pool that balances out to one, awkward, lukewarm temperature. Room temp Tang, people. Room temp Tang. "Just like Chaz's EGF webcomic..." "So 'meh' that it's unbelievable." "I'm the protagonist. :)" "I wonder if she thinks I'm cute?" "My name is Shinji Ikari, and I'd like to be your friend." "I brought booze."

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:28 am Oh dear, what have I done.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:40 am You've brought life to this forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Feb 10, 2011 5:02 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: "My name is Shinji Ikari, and I'd like to be your friend." "I brought booze."

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Thu Feb 10, 2011 12:02 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Feb 10, 2011 2:47 pm Grimmjow wrote: Lukewarm on the other hand is very mehish.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 10, 2011 3:09 pm Well, long before now I've used the scriptural reference about spitting out lukewarm water in association with Shinji's alleged confession: Shinji: I want to help you in some way... and to be with you forever.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:20 pm Strangely, this thread describes Shinji's personality very well.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:22 pm Shinji is like a cold miso soup left in the fridge.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:44 pm O hai, what’s this thread about again?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:48 pm It's not about that, so cut it out.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:51 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: I mean, just look at him:

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Feb 10, 2011 4:58 pm Well, I made the thread so I get dibs on arbitrary rules. Rule 1: this is not the Shinko/Shinyui/crossdressing thread, so keep that where it belongs. It helps instead to use a generic stock pic of him with abysmally tepid attempts at humor or commentary, such as "Well, I'm here with my backpack." "When I'm leaving after I quit the first time, I'll have a duffel bag too. I guess I bought some stuff over the couple weeks. Pretty neat, huh?"

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Feb 10, 2011 5:14 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Well, I made the thread so I get dibs on arbitrary rules.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:26 pm At the risk of sounding gay, can I say that Shinji does look cute (moe) in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:41 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: At the risk of sounding gay, can I say that Shinji does look cute (moe) in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:47 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: At the risk of sounding gay, can I say that Shinji does look cute (moe) in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:49 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Well, I made the thread so I get dibs on arbitrary rules. Rule 1: this is not the Shinko/Shinyui/crossdressing thread, so keep that where it belongs.
